Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mazen Salfiti appeared in person (petitioner).
Tracy Potts appeared via zoom for Emrich International (assignee of heirs).

Mr. Salfiti stated that they have reached a stipulated agreement. Ms. Potts suggested putting Mr. Brandeburg's share of payment, would be deposited to the San Francisco County Treasurer's office. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mazen Salfiti (administrator) appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Tracy Potts appeared by zoom for Emrich International Probate.

Mr. Salfiti stated that when he last spoke with the probate examiner, it was his understanding that if he couldn't get a final petition filed today, he would amend the second status report. Mr. Salfiti also stated that the last thing that needs to get done is getting tax identification numbers for the beneficiaries in Europe, that the monies are all there, that he thinks it is good prudence to do an accounting and requested an extension to October 15th. In addition, Salfiti stated that the cash is in FDIC insured accounts. Mrs. Potts stated that she believes an accounting is necessary because there is one beneficiary who is non-responsive. The Second Report on Status of Administration is off calendar. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for October 21, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either petition is to be filed before the hearing date. The court will authorize Mr. Salfiti to account for the entire time of administration, but if a petition for final distribution is not filed by then, Mr. Salfiti will be required to follow the rule of two-year accountings.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mazen Salfiti (propria persona) appearing via courtcall.
Tracy Potts appearing via zoom for Emrich International Probate Research, Inc.

Mrs. Pott stated that she is working with her clients to try and get waivers, individual tax identification numbers, and e-notice consents. Discussion was held regarding the issue of whether a 11700 petition is needed. The report of status of administration is under submission with the intent to grant. The Court will allow Mr. Salfiti to put monies into treasury bond.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Continued To Jan-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mazen Salfiti, via ZOOM, In Propria Persona, via ZOOM, Petitioner; Allison Bellumari, via ZOOM, for Emrich International Probate Research, Interested Party.

The court begins by confirming with Mr. Salfiti that he is an attorney and will represent himself as Administrator, if appointed. The court then advises Mr. Salfiti that the court typically does not grant requests for administrative fees and attorney's fees. Mr. Salfiti then reports that one heir had previously been located in the Netherlands and that heir had waived bond. Mr. Salfiti adds that as of about two weeks ago, he believes that the search for additional heirs has been finalized. The court advises Mr. Salfiti that Ms. Bellumori has not waived bond. Mr. Salfiti then confirms that the main asset of the estate is the real property, which is not currently receiving rental income, and that he has located cash accounts as well. He also reports that the plan is to prepare the real property for sale but that it may take some time to do so because of the current state of the property. The court then confirms with Mr. Salfiti that if he is appointed as Administrator, he would prefer to be appointed with Full Authority and a higher bond. Ms. Bellumori confirms that she supports the petition and agrees with Mr. Salfiti's suggestion. The court then confirms with the parties that a Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution will not be required and that the court intends require a bond of $2,000,000. Additionally, the court intends to set a Status on Close of Estate for December 14, 2022.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
